name: Tangy Lentil Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over lentils, wash and place in a large saucepan with bay leaves, crushed garlic, and oregano.
2. Cover with water by 2 inches, bring to boil, then simmer uncovered for 30 minutes until tender.
3. Drain, cool, and remove garlic and bay leaves.
4. To make vinaigrette, whisk together olive oil, vinegar, minced garlic, cumin, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
5. Toss with lentils, onion, and red pepper. Let sit 20 minutes.
6. Taste and season as needed with salt, pepper, and vinegar.
7. Salad can be prepared to this point up to 6 hours in advance.
8. To serve, toss salad with parsley and place on a platter.
9. Garnish with crumbled feta cheese and olives.
